decision.rationale: The plate fully honors all cited identity rules: 1) IR.sean.hair.silhouette-tousled-medium-short is met as the hair has a tousled silhouette with irregular tufts, is medium-short, and tapers to the skin at the nape and temples. 2) IR.sean.palette.full-color-pencil-test-vocabulary is honored through the use of the cream paper background, warm graphite lines, light warm skin on the neck/ears, and dirty-blonde hair, all with flat fills and cross-hatched shading without gradients or cel-shading. 3) IR.sean.style.construction-lines-visible-beneath-final is met because the vertical midline and horizontal guide lines are clearly visible beneath the final contours at a lighter weight. 4) IR.sean.style.line-weight-hb-to-2b-warm-graphite is honored, showing clear variation between the thin construction/cross-hatching lines (~0.5px) and thicker final contours (~1.5-2px) in a warm graphite color. 5) IR.sean.style.cream-paper-texture-grain is visible across the entire frame, displaying a clear paper grain rather than a flat vector color. 6) IR.sean.hair.dirty-blonde-color is honored with the dirty-blonde flat fill (#AD9468) and warm-graphite cross-hatched shadowing at the nape.
